name: Nifty Fifties Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice in 1 1/2 cups of water according to package directions.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking dish.
3. In a large bowl, combine the eggs, milk, cream, sugar, grated orange peel, vanilla, and salt. Beat until well blended.
4. Stir the raisins into the rice.
5. Spoon the rice mixture into the prepared baking dish.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the rice and sprinkle with cinnamon.
7. Place the baking dish in a larger baking pan filled with enough hot water to come halfway up the sides of the baking dish.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes, stirring once after 10 minutes and again after 15 minutes.
9. Remove the baking dish from the larger pan and let cool on a wire rack until it is cold.
10. Refrigerate, covered, at least 3 hours or overnight until the pudding is firm.
11. Serve with whipped cream, if desired.
